query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A narrow urban alley at night viewed from street level, with brick buildings lining both sides and a concrete wall in the right foreground. Overhead, a wooden utility structure supports four large electrical transformers with multiple wires extending across the frame. A lit streetlamp stands on the left side of the alley, while bright light streams from an opening at the far end. A large dumpster sits on the ground near the back of the alley, and part of a parked vehicle is visible along the left edge. Behind the alley, a taller building with regularly spaced windows rises in the background under artificial lighting.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A narrow urban alley at night viewed from street level, with weathered brick buildings lining both sides and a concrete wall in the right foreground. Overhead, a wooden utility structure supports four large electrical transformers with tangled wires extending across the frame. A streetlamp casts a sickly orange sodium vapor glow across the lower alley, while the background building appears under a conflicting cool green light, creating visibly mixed color temperatures. A large dumpster sits in the darkened passage near the back of the alley, and part of a parked vehicle is visible along the left edge. The aged industrial surroundings and heavy shadows evoke atmospheric distress and a sense of environmental degradation.
